{{Infobox character
| name = Vice Chief of Planetary Security
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Vice Chief of Planetary Security]] spoke belatedly.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] hijacked a civilian ship to reach the Vice Chief in a desert.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4">''The Pilot'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Vice Chief has a console.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8">''The Pilot'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Vice Chief has a console used for flagging suspicious locations.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Mell flagged this as a suspicious location in the Vice Chief’s console,” I said to the assembled crew.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
